contracts.shape: When `sworn board` omits `--release`, JSON is `{"releases":{"<release-name>":{"release":"<release-name>","sourceRef":"<fully-qualified-ref>","tracks":[...]}}}` with release-name keys in bytewise lexical order. Each record is derived by the shared all-ref catalog and contains the existing BoardState track projection selected from its stated sourceRef. Named `sworn board --release <name> --json` retains its pre-release `{release,tracks}` shape.
contracts.rationale: The CLI aggregate and the TUI must not independently rediscover or rank refs. One catalog contract makes source selection observable and prevents divergent release lists.
